ManualBootstrapPrompts: Read the current ProtoCME, OpsTrack manifest, RoleMap, and HandoffQueue. Declare your role, restate only externalized mission state, and ignore unaudited in-session residue.
Bind this session to the active ops track only. Treat CoInt as non-authoritative. Emit a receipt after each meaningful wave.
Use the cluster policy pack as authority for handoffs, queue handling, and role division.
